fields.name: clientId
fields.description: The client ID of the app.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Identifies the date and time when the object was created.

fields.name: databaseId
fields.description: Identifies the primary key from the database.

fields.name: description
fields.description: The description of the app.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The Node ID of the App object.

fields.name: ipAllowListEntries
fields.description: The IP addresses of the app.

arguments.name: after
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come after the specified cursor.

arguments.name: before
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come before the specified cursor.

arguments.name: first
arguments.description: Returns the first n elements from the list.

arguments.name: last
arguments.description: Returns the last n elements from the list.

arguments.name: orderBy
arguments.description: Ordering options for IP allow list entries returned.

fields.name: logoBackgroundColor
fields.description: The hex color code, without the leading '#', for the logo background.

fields.name: logoUrl
fields.description: A URL pointing to the app's logo.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The name of the app.

fields.name: slug
fields.description: A slug based on the name of the app for use in URLs.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Identifies the date and time when the object was last updated.

fields.name: url
fields.description: The URL to the app's homepage.

objects.name: Bot
objects.description: A special type of user which takes actions on behalf of GitHub Apps.

fields.name: avatarUrl
fields.description: A URL pointing to the GitHub App's public avatar.

arguments.name: size
arguments.description: The size of the resulting square image.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Identifies the date and time when the object was created.

fields.name: databaseId
fields.description: Identifies the primary key from the database.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The Node ID of the Bot object.

fields.name: login
fields.description: The username of the actor.

fields.name: resourcePath
fields.description: The HTTP path for this bot.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Identifies the date and time when the object was last updated.

fields.name: url
fields.description: The HTTP URL for this bot.

interfaces.name: OauthApplicationAuditEntryData
interfaces.description: Metadata for an audit entry with action oauth_application.*.

fields.name: oauthApplicationName
fields.description: The name of the OAuth application.

fields.name: oauthApplicationResourcePath
fields.description: The HTTP path for the OAuth application.

fields.name: oauthApplicationUrl
fields.description: The HTTP URL for the OAuth application.

enums.name: OauthApplicationCreateAuditEntryState
enums.description: The state of an OAuth application when it was created.

values.name: ACTIVE
values.description: The OAuth application was active and allowed to have OAuth Accesses.

values.name: PENDING_DELETION
values.description: The OAuth application was in the process of being deleted.

values.name: SUSPENDED
values.description: The OAuth application was suspended from generating OAuth Accesses due to abuse or security concerns.
